```{=html}
#w-impact .sh-table th { padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e4e7; }
#w-impact .sh-table td { padding: 10px 12px; vertical-align: top; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; line-height: 1.55; font-size: 12.5px; color: #333; }
#w-impact .sh-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
#w-impact .sh-name { font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; color: #1a1a1a; display: block; }
#w-impact .sh-gap { color: #b91c1c; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.6; }
</style>

<div id="w-impact">
<div class="container">
<h1>Customer Impact Translation</h1>
<p class="subtitle">How raw simulation outputs from distribution tools translate into planning decisions across stakeholder groups</p>

<div class="tab-row">
  <button class="witab active" onclick="switchTabImpact('domains')">Impact domains</button>
  <button class="witab" onclick="switchTabImpact('stakeholders')">By stakeholder</button>
</div>

<div class="wi-panel active" id="wi-domains">
<svg viewBox="0 0 680 365" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<defs>
<style>
.th { font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; fill: #1a1a1a; }
.ts { font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: #555; }
.c-gray rect { fill: #f4f4f5; stroke: #d4d4d8; stroke-width: 0.5; }
.c-teal rect { fill: #dcfce7; stroke: #86efac; stroke-width: 0.5; cursor: pointer; }
.c-purple rect { fill: #ede9fe; stroke: #c4b5fd; stroke-width: 0.5; cursor: pointer; }
.c-amber rect { fill: #fef3c7; stroke: #fcd34d; stroke-width: 0.5; cursor: pointer; }
</style>
<marker id="arrowT" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
  <path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="#1D9E75" stroke-width="1.5"/>
</marker>
<marker id="arrowP" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
  <path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="#7F77DD" stroke-width="1.5"/>
</marker>
<marker id="arrowA" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
  <path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5"/>
</marker>
</defs>

<g class="c-gray">
  <rect x="40" y="40" width="175" height="300" rx="8"/>
  <text class="th" x="127" y="62" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Simulation outputs</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="85" text-anchor="middle">Bus voltage (pu)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="107" text-anchor="middle">Line loading (%)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="129" text-anchor="middle">Transformer load (%)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="151" text-anchor="middle">Fault current (A)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="173" text-anchor="middle">Hosting capacity (kW)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="195" text-anchor="middle">Peak demand delta</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="217" text-anchor="middle">Curtailment (MWh)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="239" text-anchor="middle">Energy losses (kWh)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="127" y="261" text-anchor="middle">Voltage sag events</text>
</g>

<path d="M215 85 L255 85" fill="none" stroke="#1D9E75" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowT)"/>
<path d="M215 190 L255 190" fill="none" stroke="#7F77DD" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowP)"/>
<path d="M215 295 L255 295" fill="none" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowA)"/>

<g class="c-teal">
  <rect x="255" y="40" width="385" height="95" rx="8"/>
  <text class="th" x="447" y="67" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Grid reliability metrics</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="85" text-anchor="middle">SAIDI / SAIFI delta vs. counterfactual baseline</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="102" text-anchor="middle">Hosting capacity headroom (MW) by feeder segment</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="119" text-anchor="middle">Outage probability curves · voltage quality scores</text>
</g>

<g class="c-purple">
  <rect x="255" y="145" width="385" height="95" rx="8"/>
  <text class="th" x="447" y="172" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Economic impact metrics</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="190" text-anchor="middle">Bill savings by customer segment ($/yr)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="207" text-anchor="middle">Avoided capital investment ($M) via load deferral</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="224" text-anchor="middle">Value stack: energy, capacity, distribution, Env</text>
</g>

<g class="c-amber">
  <rect x="255" y="250" width="385" height="95" rx="8"/>
  <text class="th" x="447" y="277" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Societal and equity metrics</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="295" text-anchor="middle">EJ community DER program access rate (%)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="312" text-anchor="middle">Avoided emissions (tCO₂) · health co-benefits ($)</text>
  <text class="ts" x="447" y="329" text-anchor="middle">Resilience index · outage burden by income decile</text>
</g>
</svg>

<div class="detail-cards">
  <div class="detail-card">
    <span class="card-tag tag-teal">Grid reliability</span>
    <h3>Data sources needed</h3>
    <ul>
      <li>Customer-to-node mapping (GIS)</li>
      <li>IEEE 1366 utility outage records</li>
      <li>Protection device coordination data</li>
      <li>Historical SAIDI/SAIFI baseline</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="detail-card">
    <span class="card-tag tag-purple">Economic impact</span>
    <h3>Data sources needed</h3>
    <ul>
      <li>CPUC Avoided Cost Calculator (E3)</li>
      <li>Utility rate schedules (TOU, demand)</li>
      <li>Capital cost estimates per upgrade type</li>
      <li>Net present value / discount rate assumptions</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="detail-card">
    <span class="card-tag tag-amber">Societal / equity</span>
    <h3>Data sources needed</h3>
    <ul>
      <li>Census tract demographics</li>
      <li>EPA EJScreen indicators</li>
      <li>CDC Social Vulnerability Index</li>
      <li>EPA eGRID emissions factors</li>
      <li>EPA BenMAP health impact model</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
</div><!-- end wi-domains -->

<div class="wi-panel" id="wi-stakeholders">
<table class="sh-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="width:16%">Stakeholder</th>
      <th style="width:26%">What they need</th>
      <th style="width:30%">How outputs are translated today</th>
      <th style="width:28%">Gap</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="sh-name">Distribution planners</span></td>
      <td>Which feeders to upgrade, when, at what cost</td>
      <td>Direct use of load flow, HCA, and fault analysis outputs; violation counts by year by scenario</td>
      <td><span class="sh-gap">No standard output format; feeder-level results rarely integrated with capital planning models automatically</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="sh-name">State regulators (PUCs)</span></td>
      <td>Are proposed investments justified? Are alternatives considered? Are costs allocated fairly?</td>
      <td>Utility rate case filings presenting study results selectively; intervenor expert witnesses challenge assumptions</td>
      <td><span class="sh-gap">In ~30 states, regulators do not receive distribution system plans before rate cases; planning assumptions are not routinely disclosed</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="sh-name">Large load customers</span></td>
      <td>Can I connect? How much will upgrades cost? How long will it take?</td>
      <td>Interconnection study results: thermal headroom, upgrade requirements, cost estimate</td>
      <td><span class="sh-gap">Study timelines of 3–9 months, lack of utility standardization, and no national process for distribution-level large loads</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="sh-name">DER developers</span></td>
      <td>Can I interconnect? Where is capacity? What will upgrades cost?</td>
      <td>Hosting capacity maps; interconnection study if above simplified threshold</td>
      <td><span class="sh-gap">HCA maps often stale; maps don't communicate upgrade cost or feasibility to reach next MW of headroom</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="sh-name">EV charging developers</span></td>
      <td>Will my EVSE installation require feeder upgrades? At whose cost?</td>
      <td>Utility load study if above site service threshold; no federal standard exists</td>
      <td><span class="sh-gap">No mandatory interconnection study below MW threshold; cumulative feeder impact from many EVSE installations is not assessed</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="sh-name">Community / EJ advocates</span></td>
      <td>Are investments reaching disadvantaged communities? Are rate impacts equitable?</td>
      <td>Not systematically provided; requires bespoke spatial analysis linking feeder maps, census data, and rate impact models</td>
      <td><span class="sh-gap">No standardized pipeline from distribution study outputs to equity metrics; CPUC D.24-10-030 (Oct 2024) begins to mandate this in CA only</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="sh-name">Residential customers</span></td>
      <td>Will my rates change? Will reliability improve?</td>
      <td>Rate case summary documents; SAIDI/SAIFI reporting</td>
      <td><span class="sh-gap">Translation from engineering metrics to customer outcomes is not standardized anywhere</span></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
</div><!-- end wi-stakeholders -->

</div>
</div>
```

The most immediate opportunities lie in extending the integrated distribution planning frameworks developed in New York, California, and Illinois — requiring public disclosure of system plans, combined multi-technology study standards, and systematic NWA evaluation — to the rest of the US, roughly 30 states where no such requirements currently exist. Establishing a federal research agenda to fill the empirical gap in multi-stressor feeder analysis would also valuable.

---

## References

1. Horowitz et al., NREL 2019; IEC/IEEE review literature 2023–25
2. NERC July 2025 whitepaper; PG&E/Sandia SWAP project 2023
3. NERC, IBR and DER Disturbances Advisory, June 2024
4. NY PSC, Reforming the Energy Vision (REV) proceeding; Con Edison Brooklyn-Queens Demand Management Program (BQDM), 2014–2016

```{=html}
<script>
function switchTabImpact(name) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-impact .witab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-impact .wi-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelector('#w-impact .witab[onclick="switchTabImpact(\'' + name + '\')"]').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('wi-' + name).classList.add('active');
}
function switchTabTriggers(name) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-triggers .wtab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-triggers .wtab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelector('#w-triggers .wtab[onclick="switchTabTriggers(\'' + name + '\')"]').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('wtrig-' + name).classList.add('active');
}
function toggleCardTools(card) {
  const detail = card.querySelector('.tool-detail');
  const isOpen = detail.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-tools .tool-detail.open').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('open'));
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-tools .tool-card.active').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
  if (!isOpen) { detail.classList.add('open'); card.classList.add('active'); }
}
function filterCardsTools(tier, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-tools .filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-tools .tool-card').forEach(card => {
    card.style.display = (tier === 'all' || card.dataset.tier === tier) ? '' : 'none';
    if (tier !== 'all' && card.dataset.tier !== tier) {
      card.querySelector('.tool-detail').classList.remove('open');
      card.classList.remove('active');
    }
  });
}
function switchTabTools(name) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-tools .tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('#w-tools .tab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelector('#w-tools .tab[onclick="switchTabTools(\'' + name + '\')"]').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('wtools-' + name).classList.add('active');
}
document.querySelectorAll('#w-triggers .filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('#w-triggers .filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    const filter = btn.dataset.filter;
    document.querySelectorAll('#trig-tbody tr').forEach(row => {
      row.classList.toggle('hidden', filter !== 'all' && row.dataset.status !== filter);
    });
  });
});
function swCmnd(i){document.querySelectorAll('#w-compound .tab').forEach((t,j)=>t.classList.toggle('on',j===i));document.querySelectorAll('#w-compound .panel').forEach((p,j)=>p.classList.toggle('on',j===i));}
function selCmnd(i,btn){document.querySelectorAll('#w-compound .tech-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));btn.classList.add('on');document.querySelectorAll('#w-compound .detail').forEach((d,j)=>d.classList.toggle('on',j===i));}
</script>
```
